title: Junior–Mid Full Stack Engineer
description: About Us Ruby Labs is a leading tech company that creates and operates innovative consumer products. We offer a diverse range of opportunities across the health, education, and entertainment industries. Our innovative teams are driving the future of consumer-led products, and we're always looking for passionate individuals to join us. Learn more about our story at: https://rubylabs.com/about-us/ About The Role At Ruby Labs, we are building a new Direct-to-Consumer product in the AI category, and we’re looking for a Junior–Mid Full-Stack Engineer to join our team. In this role, you will help develop and improve our web platform using Next.js, React, and TypeScript. You’ll work closely with senior engineers to implement new features, improve performance, and maintain reliable systems. This position is ideal for engineers who already have solid development experience and want to grow their skills while working on high-scale consumer products and modern AI-powered features. Key Responsibilities Develop web application features using Next.js, React, and TypeScript. Implement APIs and backend functionality with guidance from senior engineers. Work with databases and caching tools to support application performance. Fix bugs and improve existing functionality. Write clean, maintainable code following team standards. Participate in code reviews and technical discussions. Help implement testing to ensure application stability. Collaborate with product managers, designers, and engineers to ship new features. Qualifications Experience with JavaScript or TypeScript. Experience with React or Next.js. Experience building web applications or APIs. Basic understanding of relational databases (e.g., PostgreSQL). Familiarity with Git and modern development workflows. Strong problem-solving mindset. Good communication and collaboration skills. Willingness to learn new technologies and improve technical skills. Attention to detail and code quality. Ability to work effectively in an Agile development environment. Nice to have Experience with Next.js. Experience with Redis or other caching systems. Exposure to AI tools or LLM APIs. Experience with automated testing frameworks. Location Ruby Labs operates within the CET (Central European Time) zone. Applicants from any country are welcome to apply for the position as long as they are located within approximately ± 4 hours of CET. This ensures optimal collaboration and communication during working hours. Benefits Discover the perks of being part of our vibrant team! We offer: Remote Work Environment: Embrace the freedom to work from anywhere, anytime, promoting a healthy work-life balance. Unlimited PTO: Enjoy unlimited paid time off to recharge and prioritize your well-being, without counting days. Paid National Holidays: Celebrate and relax on national holidays with paid time off to unwind and recharge. Company-provided MacBook: Experience seamless productivity with top-notch Apple MacBooks provided to all employees who need them. Flexible Independent Contractor Agreement: Unlock the benefits of flexibility, autonomy, and entrepreneurial opportunities. Benefit from tax advantages, networking opportunities, reduced employment obligations, and the freedom to work from anywhere. Read more about it here: https://docs.google.com/document/d/1tzxGX4Uu7Ts_HCLFXESKLnKaaBfVCPf1f9AYZPrkjJM/preview?tab=t.0 Be part of our fast-growing team and seize this excellent opportunity for personal and professional growth! Interview Process After submitting your application, we conduct a thorough review which typically takes 3 to 5 days, but may occasionally take longer due to the volume of applications received. If we see a potential fit, we proceed with the following steps: Recruiter Screening (40 minutes) Technical Interview (60 minutes) Final Interview (30 minutes) Life at Ruby Labs At Ruby Labs, we move fast, aim high, and expect the same from our team. We’re not here to play small—we’re here to build, grow, and win. That means we look for people who are ambitious, driven, and ready to give their best every single day. This is a place for individuals who thrive under pressure, embrace challenges, and see opportunity in every obstacle. If you’re hungry to achieve, motivated by impact, and want to grow at the speed of your own ambition, Ruby Labs offers the platform to make it happen. Here, effort is matched with reward. We recognize those who go all in and deliver results, and we create space for people who want more—more responsibility, more growth, and more success.

title: Senior SAP CAP Node.js Developer
description: We are currently seeking a seasoned Senior SAP CAP Node.js Developer to join our dynamic team of professionals. In this role, you will conduct code reviews, develop features, and troubleshoot application issues. You will collaborate with stakeholders, provide architectural input, and drive innovative solutions. Join us to elevate our technological capabilities and streamline development processes. Responsibilities Conduct code reviews and develop features based on best software development practices, ensuring clean code and clean design Monitor applications, troubleshoot issues and resolve bugs Write technical and user documentation Cooperate with the team, track its performance and needs Collaborate with customers and stakeholders on technical topics, provide required metrics to management Participate in the setup, improvement and implementation of development processes Provide design and architectural decisions Requirements 7+ years of proven engineering experience in SAPUI5, BTP, HANA, CAP, Node.JS, CI/CD (Jenkins, Piper, Webdriver.IO) etc. Wide generic technological view is expected. Experience working as team leader focus on cloud, SAP, architecture and mentoring 10+ ppl Proficiency in design principles and competency in microservice architecture Familiarity with Agile methodologies (Scrum, Kanban, etc.) Basic understanding of JavaScript and Node.js Work experience or theoretical knowledge of SAP Business Technology Platform (BTP), HANA database and SAP CAP (Java, Node.js) English proficiency level B2 and higher We offer CONTINUOUS UPSKILLING, LEARNING & DEVELOPMENT Diversity of tasks and projects Assessment center for objective review of competency level Personal development plan Mentoring programs and leadership development Certification and professional development support Access to learning platforms including more than 2,500 internal courses and the LinkedIn Learning library with 20,000+ courses English courses taught by certified teachers CORPORATE BENEFITS Extra leave days Referral bonuses COMPENSATION PACKAGE Competitive compensation paid in USD Regular salary and performance reviews MEDICAL & HEALTHCARE Private health insurance Well-being events WORKING ENVIRONMENT Recreation areas and kitchens Tea, coffee, and snacks Well-being events Sports equipment and game consoles IT Equipment Microsoft's Software Assurance Home Use Program (HUP) EPAM is a leading global provider of digital platform engineering and development services. We are committed to having a positive impact on our customers, our employees, and our communities. We embrace a dynamic and inclusive culture. Here you will collaborate with multi-national teams, contribute to a myriad of innovative projects that deliver the most creative and cutting-edge solutions, and have an opportunity to continuously learn and grow. No matter where you are located, you will join a dedicated, creative, and diverse community that will help you discover your fullest potential. Please note that our Talent Attraction Team reviews applications and CVs submitted in English.

title: Full Stack Engineer
description: Company Overview Turbo Webs LTD is a technology company focused on building advanced digital platforms, business systems, and SaaS solutions for local and global markets. Our team develops scalable web applications that help companies improve productivity, automate workflows, and manage operations through modern and intelligent software solutions. We work on different types of platforms, including business dashboards, management systems, AI-supported tools, and workflow-based applications. Role Overview We are looking for a Full Stack Developer to join our team in Istanbul, Türkiye. The Full Stack Developer will be responsible for developing, maintaining, and improving both the front-end and back-end parts of our web applications. The role requires good technical knowledge, problem-solving skills, and the ability to work on structured business platforms and dashboard-based systems. Strong English communication skills are very important, as the role may involve working with international clients, reading technical documentation, and communicating with the development team. The developer will work closely with the product and technical teams to implement new features, integrate APIs, improve system performance, and maintain clean, scalable code. Key Responsibilities Develop and maintain modern web applications using React and Django Build responsive, user-friendly, and clean front-end interfaces Design, develop, and integrate backend services and APIs Work with PostgreSQL databases and manage structured data efficiently Support structured business workflows and dashboard-based systems Implement and manage role-based access control and permission-driven features Integrate third-party APIs and internal system services Use Git for version control and collaborative development Debug, troubleshoot, and resolve technical issues Write clean, maintainable, and well-structured code Collaborate with the team on planning, development, testing, and improvements Support performance, security, and scalability improvements across the platform Required Skills & Qualifications Good knowledge of React Experience with Django Experience integrating APIs and handling structured business workflows Ability to work with PostgreSQL Familiarity with Redis Understanding of RBAC and permission-driven systems Experience working with Git and collaborative development environments Good attention to clean code, maintainability, and problem solving Strong English communication skills Ability to work in a team and follow development standards Responsible, organized, and willing to learn Bonus Skills Basic understanding of deployment and server environments Familiarity with AI-assisted development tools such as Cursor Experience working on business platforms or dashboard-based systems Knowledge of Docker or cloud deployment Familiarity with AI integrations or data analytics tools Experience working in agile development environments Requirements The candidate must be based in or able to work in Istanbul, Türkiye English language skills are highly important Ability to work with the team in a professional development environment Strong sense of responsibility and commitment to deadlines Willingness to learn, improve, and adapt to project requirements Preferred Qualifications Experience working on SaaS platforms Experience building admin panels, business dashboards, or internal management systems Knowledge of deployment, server environments, or cloud-based infrastructure Experience with AI-assisted development tools Ability to understand business logic and convert it into clean technical solutions

title: Software Engineer - Backend
description: Come build the future of local delivery with us At Shipday , our mission is to build better, faster local delivery infrastructure for global e-commerce. Already used in 100+ countries, our customers have processed more than 50 million deliveries on our platform. As a rapidly growing SaaS company, we are committed to leveraging data-driven insights to drive innovation and optimize our services. We are seeking a talented and driven Backend Developer to join our dynamic team and contribute to our continued success. Backend Developer As a Backend Developer at Shipday, you will play a critical role in building the core infrastructure of our SaaS platform. You will design and build the core services that keep those deliveries fast, reliable, and secure. Your work will directly impact platform performance, developer velocity, and customer experience. You’ll be collaborating closely with a multi-disciplinary team including engineering, product, and business development to solve complex problems and create data-driven solutions. Who we are looking for Analytical and Problem Solver: You excel at analyzing data and drawing insights to solve complex problems. Inquisitive: You have a natural curiosity and the ability to ask the right questions to understand business needs. Detail-Oriented: You pay close attention to data quality and precision. Collaborative: You excel in a team environment and are able to communicate effectively with both technical and non-technical stakeholders. Results-Oriented: You focus on delivering actionable insights that have a real impact on the business. Requirements Minimum 3 years of full-time software development experience Previous experience as a Backend Developer or similar role Proficient in Unix, Java, Python Familiar with AWS and microservices Familiar with databases (e.g. SQL and NoSQL) Familiarity with designing and building APIs (eg, REST API’s) Familiarity with Map APIs is a plus (Google Maps etc) Experience in writing unit tests Responsibilities Work within our product teams to design and develop our core backend that support multiple applications Improve our code base through continuous refactoring Solve challenging real-time data transfer and synchronization problems Implement unit tests Be communicative and collaborative
